vllm.title: [Core][Hash][Automatic Prefix caching] Accelerating the hashing function by avoiding deep copies
vllm.author: KuntaiDu
vllm.bodyExcerpt:
The hashing function implemented in automatic prefix caching is running slowly. To benchmark its performance, I implemented a new benchmarking script benchmarks/benchmark_hashing.py. It shows that the hashing takes 47.98% of the total inference time when all prefix blocks are cached.
After profiling

vllm.title: [Bugfix][Doc] Fix CI failure in docs
vllm.author: DarkLight1337
vllm.bodyExcerpt:
This PR fixes the CI failure introduced by #4798.
The failure originates from having duplicate target names in reST, and is fixed by changing the ref targets to anonymous ones. For more information, see this discussion.
I have also changed the format of the links to be more distinct from each other.

vllm.title: [Core] Add MultiprocessingGPUExecutor
vllm.author: njhill
vllm.bodyExcerpt:
This introduces a python multiprocessing-based executor that can be used as an alternative to Ray for single-node inferencing.
With the changes in this PR, Ray will continue to be used for parallel workers if it's installed, otherwise vanilla python multiprocessing is used. It can also be overridden

vllm.title: Revert "[Kernel] Use flash-attn for decoding (#3648)"
vllm.author: rkooo567
vllm.bodyExcerpt:
Lora 3 & 4 test seems to have illegal memory access failure after this commit;
[2024-05-14 23:51:18,182 E 22 22] logging.cc:101: Unhandled exception: N3c105ErrorE. what(): CUDA error: an illegal memory access was encountered

vllm.title: [Core][2/N] Model runner refactoring part 2. Combine prepare prefill / decode to a single API
vllm.author: rkooo567
vllm.bodyExcerpt:
This PR combines prepare_prompt and prepare_decode into a single API. This PR also coelsce the attn metadata for prefill/decode to a single class and allow to slice them when running attn backend.
It also refactors subquery_start_loc which was not refactored in the previous PR

vllm.title: [CI/Build] Further decouple HuggingFace implementation from ours during tests
vllm.author: DarkLight1337
vllm.bodyExcerpt: Currently, the HfRunner used for model tests loads the tokenizer using our get_tokenizer method instead of directly through HuggingFace, resulting in possible overlap in the underlying implementation with VllmRunner.
